headline: EU could face higher US tariffs, depending on Thurs. vote
summary: Yahoo Finance Senior Producer John Hyland tracks Monday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories. The euro (EURUSD=X) is in focus on news that the European Union (EU) will face higher tariffs if the US–EU trade deal doesn't get approval on Thursday. David Simon, the CEO of shopping mall giant Simon Property Group (SPG), has died at age 64.

headline: David Simon, shopping mall king, dies at 64 after cancer fight
summary: (Bloomberg) -- David Simon, the chairman and chief executive officer of US shopping mall heavyweight Simon Property Group, died of cancer. He was 64.Simon joined family-owned Melvin Simon & Associates as chief financial officer in 1990 and steered the firm through a public listing three years later, according to a company statement. He took over as CEO in 1995 at 33. Since then, Simon has amassed an empire of 250 properties across North America, Europe and Asia, including top-tier malls such as

headline: David Simon, Mall King Who Was Both Feared and Admired, Dies at 64
summary: David Simon,  whose ruthless negotiating tactics, obsession with details and sheer force of will turned his family’s real-estate business into the largest mall owner in the country, died Sunday after a cancer diagnosis in 2024.  During his more than three decades as  Simon Property Group’s  chief executive, the inveterate dealmaker gobbled up competitors and defied critics, who said malls were obsolete.  The Simon family, through a charitable foundation, donates to many causes, including a $5 million gift to Columbia University.

headline: Simon Property Group Announces the Passing of David Simon
summary: It is with profound sorrow and immense respect that the Board of Directors of Simon Property Group, Inc. (NYSE: SPG) announces the passing of David Simon, the Company's visionary Chairman of the Board, Chief Executive Officer and President — the singular leader who built Simon Property Group into the largest and most admired retail real estate company in the world. He was 64 years old.
